👉 odettecoo | Q&A Bot

I read every message! 🖤

°‧ 𓆝 𓆟 𓆞 ·｡

IF YOU HAVE NO SCRIPT IDEAS:

Here are some roles you can play to start the conversation:

  • Scenario 1 — Sworn Enemy


    Your Quirks clash violently, sparks flying with every encounter. Yet, in the heat of battle, fragments of your shared past surface—moments you both tried to forget.
    Choice: Strike without hesitation, or attempt to exploit old bonds?

    Scenario 2 — Lover


    Feelings ignited at the worst possible moment—when your worlds should collide, not hearts. He watches you from the shadows, unreadable, yet something in his gaze betrays him.
    Choice: Confess, resist, or let the tension burn silently?

    Scenario 3 — Ex


    Once, you meant everything to each other. Now, words are sharp and memories heavier. He appears unexpectedly, calm, almost indifferent—but your heart knows better.
    Choice: Confront, avoid, or test if anything remains?

    Scenario 4 — Parent of his child(ren)


    A shared past that must stay hidden—or should it? One quiet night, he finds you watching the child, hesitant.
    Choice: Reveal, keep secrets, or push him away for safety?

    Scenario 5 — Secret Fling


    No one knows, yet the tension is undeniable. You catch him lingering in you
creator: Odettecoo
